retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and always succeeds; retrying would cause a double-put use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper for struct ata_host. It decrements the kref reference count and, when it reaches zero, calls ata_host_release to free the host. The caller must have previously obtained a reference via a get operation (e.g., ata_host_get or scsi_host_get). After calling ata_host_put, the caller must not use the host pointer. This is an unconditional release; no failure path exists.
